calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Receipt For Funds Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: for Anis Nicola Shamiyeh for Petitioner Patrick Joseph Dirrane.

Mr. Shamiyeh informed the Court that an order authorizing the deposit of funds into blocked account had been filed, and provided a copy of it to the Court for her review. He also provided the Court with the Receipt for Depoist into Blocked Account, which he proposed to file today. The Court directed the filing of the receipt by petitioner today.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.

Ex Parte Application For An Order To Correct Typographical Error In Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (749 Prague Street, San Francisco Ca, 94122)
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: A. Nick Shamiyeh for (petitioner) Patrick Dirrane.

The sale was confirmed at $830,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds are to be placed into a blocked account a Bank of America, the court to determine if more than one account is necessary. The status of filing receipt for funds into a blocked account is set for November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (749 Prague Street, San Francisco Ca, 94122)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: A. Nicola Shamiyeh for (petitioner) Patrick Dirrane.

The Court stated that due to the change in sale price the petitioner will need to file and notice an amended petition. The Report of sale and petition to confirm sale of real property was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
